V1.name: V1 ge sub-if global-only strict
V1.setup_vrf_log:
configure
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34.100 vlan-id 100
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# network-services vrf instance urpf_v1_vrf
NCP3-nog(cfg-netsrv-vrf-inst)# interface ge400-0/0/34.100
NCP3-nog(cfg-netsrv-vrf-inst)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# commit
Commit succeeded by dnroot at 20-Apr-2026 03:20:13 UTC
NCP3-nog(cfg)# end
NCP3-nog#
V1.s1_log:
configure
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34.100 urpf admin-state enabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34.100 urpf mode strict
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# interfaces ge400-0/0/34.100 urpf allow-default disabled
NCP3-nog(cfg)# top
NCP3-nog(cfg)# commit
Commit succeeded by dnroot at 20-Apr-2026 03:20:50 UTC
NCP3-nog(cfg)# end
NCP3-nog#

    urpf

      allow-default disabled
      mode strict
    !
  !
!

V4.s4_desc: Change v6 per-AFI AD disabled->enabled (strict unavailable on IRB)
V4.s4_log:
